name: list_appointments
description: List a patient's appointments (upcoming BOOKED ones by default). ALWAYS call this to get the real appointment_id before reschedule_appointment or cancel_appointment when the caller has not already given you a UUID from this conversation. Never invent or guess an appointment_id.
pre_call_message: One moment, pulling up your appointments.

upcoming_only.description: Defaults to true: only future booked appointments.
